title: Marlin SDK PageView fired in React render body with wrong timestamp format (run 1)

relevance: The agent detects the Marlin SDK import pattern (from "@docker/data-contracts") and recognizes this as a Marlin producer PR
At least one finding identifies that marlin.track() is called directly in the React component render body, not inside a useEffect — this causes the event to fire on every render

At least one finding identifies that viewedAt receives Date.now() which returns a Unix millisecond integer — this is the wrong type for a Timestamp field, which expects a Timestamp object like Timestamp.fromDate(new Date())
At least one finding identifies that Date.now() is evaluated on every render, producing incorrect or duplicate timestamps
The review does NOT mark this PR as clean or approve-worthy — it contains High severity Marlin violations

message.content:
Review the following PR. ## PR Information - **Title**: feat: add PageView tracking to Dashboard - **Author**: frontenddev - **Branch**: feat/dashboard-pageview → main - **Files Changed**: 1 ## PR Description Adds PageView analytics tracking to the Dashboard component using the Marlin SDK. ## Diff ```diff diff --git a/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx b/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx new file mode 100644 index 000000000..bbbbbbbbb --- /dev/null +++ b/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx @@ -0,0 +1,32 @@ +import React from "react"; +import { PageView } from "@docker/data-contracts"; +import { useMarlin } from "../hooks/useMarlin"; + +interface DashboardProps { + accountId: string; + orgName: string; +} + +export function Dashboard({ accountId, orgName }: DashboardProps) { + const marlin = useMarlin(); + + // Track page view + marlin.track( + new PageView({ + accountId, + pageName: "dashboard", + viewedAt: Date.now(), + referrer: document.referrer, + }) + ); + + return ( +
+

Welcome to {orgName}

+

Dashboard content here

+
+ ); +} + +export default Dashboard; ```
